workshoptitle: Build Custom MCP Servers for Oracle Agent Factory

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Learn what MCP servers are and how they integrate with Oracle Agent Factory

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Set Up Your MCP Development Environment
tutorials.description: Install Python, FastMCP, and configure your VM for MCP development

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Build & Test Your First MCP Server
tutorials.description: Write a Hello World MCP server and test it through Oracle Agent Factory

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Build a Database MCP Server
tutorials.description: Build an Oracle Database MCP server with 4 SQL tools

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Deploy as a Persistent Service
tutorials.description: Deploy your MCP server as a systemd service that auto-starts on boot

tutorials.title: (Optional) Containerize Your MCP Server with Docker
tutorials.description: Alternative deployment using Docker containers with volume-mounted code

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Solutions to common problems and known issues
